scope: Maintenance-mode abstract functional-design optimization map for agentic-nested-state-machine.opml.

remaining_weak_logic_clusters.title: Typed Source Plane
remaining_weak_logic_clusters.current_problem: The OPML remains a free-form tree, so node typing, scope layer, and promotion status are still reconstructed downstream rather than declared at the source.
source_signals: free-form OPML tree remains the primary source archive
promotion and node typing are reconstructed in downstream review assets

remaining_weak_logic_clusters.title: Product Interaction Archive Plane
remaining_weak_logic_clusters.current_problem: Viewport, selection, color-coding, scrolling, extraction, and concrete client interaction ideas still live in the same mother-structure as workflow logic.

remaining_weak_logic_clusters.title: Execution Substrate Plane
remaining_weak_logic_clusters.current_problem: Agent taxonomy, account-bearing execution identities, external helper types, and substrate-specific execution imagination are still mixed with method architecture.

remaining_weak_logic_clusters.title: Topology Decision Plane
remaining_weak_logic_clusters.current_problem: Branch-topology semantics are partially normalized, but the source still contains overlapping fork/split/candidate-generation imagination without one decisive topology table.

remaining_weak_logic_clusters.title: Archive And Compatibility Plane
remaining_weak_logic_clusters.current_problem: Historical artifacts and compatibility-only concepts are still tail-heavy decisions rather than one normalized archive/compatibility layer.

remaining_weak_logic_clusters.title: Optional Strategy And Intervention Plane
remaining_weak_logic_clusters.current_problem: Demand visibility shaping, field construction, adoption pressure, and optional acceleration mechanisms are still too close to the default problem-structuring core.
source_signals: 北极星指标与竞争壁垒 related material

recommended_sequence: Keep typed_source_plane aligned with the promotion catalog rather than expanding architecture surface by default.
Keep the maintained metaPrompt chapter scaffold explicit through metaPrompt-step-index.json rather than reconstructing chapter order from prose each round.
Keep product_interaction_archive_plane frozen unless a real product-facing consumer now requires extra distinctions.
Keep execution_substrate_plane frozen unless executor selection or continuity policy really depends on substrate taxonomy.
Keep topology_decision_plane waiting for a real distinguishing case.
Keep archive_compatibility_plane policy-defined unless a real reactivation trigger appears.
Keep strategy_intervention_plane explicitly gated outside the neutral core.
Use release-consolidation-checklist.json as the default maintenance map.
